desc: Cull dead code (5 files, 831 LOC), remove unused @types/commander dep, add render layer unit tests (pure functions), add brief-gate unit tests (pure validation), add handoff-journal unit tests (IO, tmp dirs), add agent-executor unit tests (IO, tmp dirs).

init.desc: Anchor: 356 tests, tsc clean. 5 dead files (831 LOC), 1 unused dep. Render layer (7 pure modules, 0 tests), agent-dispatch layer (5 modules, 0 tests).

dead-code-cull.desc: Delete 5 dead files: src/lib/god-engineer-prompt.ts, src/lib/plan-overlay.ts, src/lib/receipts-ux.ts, src/lib/scaffold.ts, src/spec-kit/agent-brief.ts. Remove @types/commander from devDependencies in package.json. Verify tsc clean and all tests pass after removal.

render-tests.desc: Unit tests for src/lib/render/ — pure string functions, no IO. Cover: layout (resolveWidth, wrapText, truncate, padEnd), bars (progressBar, progressLine), box (boxPanel, boxTable), style (ansiEnabled, styled, emoji, STATUS_EMOJI constants), dag (renderDagLayers, renderCriticalPath), errors (renderErrorPanel), index (render, renderNodes dispatch). All pure — no tmp dirs needed. Minimum 30 test cases.

brief-gate-tests.desc: Unit tests for src/lib/agent-dispatch/brief-gate.ts — pure validation, no IO. Cover: BriefGate.validate (required fields, field formats, artifact integrity, DAG leakage check, handoff integrity), validateBrief, validateBriefContract (null, non-object, valid), isSealedBrief type guard, formatBriefValidationReport. Test matrix: valid brief passes, each required field missing fails, invalid mode fails, oversized produces warns, DAG fields rejected, handoff progress bounds, summary length bounds. Minimum 20 test cases.

handoff-journal-tests.desc: Unit tests for src/lib/agent-dispatch/handoff-journal.ts — filesystem IO, needs tmp dirs. Cover: HandoffJournal class (writeInterim, writeFinal, loadInterims, loadFinal, loadChain, clearNode), standalone functions (writeInterimHandoff, writeFinalHandoff, loadJournal, loadFinal, saveInterim, saveFinal, journalDir). Test: roundtrip write+load, chronological ordering of interims, missing files return null/empty, clearNode idempotent, invalid JSON handled gracefully. Minimum 15 test cases.

agent-executor-tests.desc: Unit tests for src/lib/agent-dispatch/agent-executor.ts — filesystem IO, needs tmp dirs with mock consumes/produces. Cover: AgentExecutor (readConsumed access control, writeProduced access control + dir creation, execute success path, execute with missing produces). Test: read allowed artifact passes, read disallowed artifact throws, write to produces dir creates file, execute with all produces existing succeeds, execute with missing produce fails. Minimum 10 test cases.

term.desc: Dead code culled (-831 LOC, -1 dep). Render layer fully tested (pure). Agent-dispatch core tested (brief-gate, handoff-journal, agent-executor). Full suite green, tsc clean.
